callGraph.callee:
await this.slotRepo
      .createQueryBuilder('s')
      .select('s.slotDate', 'date')
      .addSelect('s.status', 'status')
      .addSelect('COUNT(*)', 'count')
      .where('s.slotDate BETWEEN :from AND :to', { from, to })
      .groupBy('s.slotDate')
      .addGroupBy('s.status')
      .getRawMany
